scenarios.name: Migrate React useState/useEffect/useMemo to SolidJS primitives
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly uses createSignal/createEffect/createMemo with getter-call syntax and notes components run once, while baseline guesses partial APIs and misses Solid's call-as-function reactivity model.

scenarios.name: Build SolidStart user detail route with server function
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses createAsync + useParams + 'use server' directive and wraps in Suspense/Show pattern from the skill; baseline reaches for generic SSR patterns and misses the server function boundary.
